mapper.sql: id, workspace_id, stable_key, name, description, layer, parent_package_id, status, designer_principal_type, designer_principal_id, designer_display_label, publisher_principal_type, publisher_principal_id, publisher_display_label, current_published_version_id, revision, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO domain_package (id, workspace_id, stable_key, name, description, layer, parent_package_id, status, designer_principal_type, designer_principal_id, designer_display_label, publisher_principal_type, publisher_principal_id, publisher_display_label, current_published_version_id, revision, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{workspaceId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{stableKey}, #{name}, #{description}, #{layer, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{parentPackageId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{status, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{designerPrincipalType, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{designerPrincipalId}, #{designerDisplayLabel}, #{publisherPrincipalType, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{publisherPrincipalId}, #{publisherDisplayLabel}, #{currentPublishedVersionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{revision}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE domain_package SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision}
